name: Chasing Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak beans in water to cover overnight. Drain, then cover with cold water and simmer until the beans are tender, about 1 hour.
2. Add tomatoes and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
3. In a separate skillet, sauté green peppers in oil until they are tender. Add onions and cook until tender. Stir frequently.
4. Add garlic and parsley to the onion mixture.
5. In another skillet, melt butter and add chuck and pork. Brown for 15 minutes until crumbly. Add this to the onion mixture and stir in chili powder. Cook for 10 minutes and then add to the beans.
6. Season with salt, pepper, cumin seeds, and MSG.
7. Simmer covered for 1 hour, then remove the cover and simmer for an additional 30 minutes. Skim fat from the top. Serves 10.
